content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 4.8 — BankID is a government-mandated national eID for authenticating with the Swedish tax authority (Skatteverket), not a general-purpose third-party/social login, so this qualifies as an exempt case under 4.8 (login exclusively tied to a specific legal/government identity verification requirement); see App/LoginView.swift:1-30 and description.txt describing BankID as Sweden's national electronic identification system.
